description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and test. In the build stage add four manual jobs—bin_linux, bin_linux_en, bin_windows, and bin_windows_en—each using the gcc Docker image; the Linux jobs run a before_script "apt-get update && apt-get install -y make libncurses5-dev libgpm-dev" then execute "make linux" or "make linux_en" respectively, while the Windows jobs run a before_script "apt-get update && apt-get install -y make mingw-w64" then execute "make windows" or "make windows_en" respectively, and each uploads an artifact named ataque_zombie_linux_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}, ataque_zombie_linux_english_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}, ataque_zombie_windows_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} or ataque_zombie_windows_english_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} containing the built binary. In the test stage add a test_linux job that depends on bin_linux, uses the busybox:latest image, and runs "./ataque_zombie --test" as its script. The build jobs are triggered manually, while the test job runs automatically after the build artifacts are available.
